Hero.subtitle: Sana Archicons combines construction advisory, energy consulting and AI consultancy with process automation — for smarter, more sustainable and future-proof results.

Services.title: Our services
Services.subtitle: From construction advice to AI implementation — concrete, measurable and tailored to your organisation.
Services.s1Desc: Professional construction advice for renovations, refurbishments and new-build projects — from technical surveys to on-site supervision.
Services.s2Desc: Energy scans, sustainability advice and support with subsidy applications — we help make your property or organisation more energy-efficient and future-proof.
Services.s3Desc: A clear AI roadmap: where AI delivers value right away, which opportunities fit your organisation and how to start with artificial intelligence responsibly.
Services.s4Desc: Smart workflows, integrations and more efficient business processes with AI tools — less manual work, more focus on what truly matters.
Services.s5Desc: As a certified advisor we draw up the official energy label for your home and register it in line with current regulations — including the new energy label from 29 May 2026.
Services.s6Desc: A concrete improvement plan with measures — insulation, installations, generation — ranked by cost and payback period, so you reach a better label step by step.

EnergyLabel.title: What does your label mean, and what can you improve?
EnergyLabel.subtitle: Click a class to see what it means — and the next step we usually recommend.
EnergyLabel.hint: Energy index per class (indicative values) — click or use the Tab key to explore.
EnergyLabel.groupLabel: Energy label classes A through G
EnergyLabel.detailDefault: Click a label to see the explanation and our advice.

A.toelichting: An excellently insulated, energy-efficient home with efficient installations and often its own generation (solar panels).
A.advies: Maintain the level and optimise comfort — think smart control and monitoring of consumption.

B.toelichting: A well-insulated home with efficient installations; just a small step away from the top level.
B.advies: With targeted improvements to insulation or generation you can reach label A relatively easily.

C.toelichting: Comparable to the average Dutch home — reasonable, but there is gain to be had.
C.advies: An improvement plan with insulation and a more efficient heat source moves you towards label A or B.

D.toelichting: The home uses more than average; insulation and installations are partly outdated.
D.advies: Start with the shell (roof, façade, glazing); that delivers the most comfort and the fastest payback.

E.toelichting: Limited insulation and outdated installations lead to higher energy use.
E.advies: A phased improvement plan avoids unnecessary costs and often makes subsidies attainable.

F.toelichting: An energy-inefficient home with little insulation and inefficient heating.
F.advies: The greatest gains are here — we draw up a plan that fits your budget.

G.toelichting: The least efficient class: barely any insulation and heavily outdated installations.
G.advies: With a step-by-step improvement plan and available subsidies, large leaps become possible.

EnergyPlan.title: Your improvement plan in four steps
EnergyPlan.subtitle: From survey to delivery — concrete, ranked by cost and payback period, with support for subsidies.

steps.title: Home survey
steps.desc: We map your home: year of construction, surfaces, insulation and installations — on site or based on documents.

steps.title: Energy label & scoring
steps.desc: A detailed scoring forms the basis for the official energy label and shows your current starting point.

steps.title: Tailored improvement plan
steps.desc: Concrete measures — insulation, installations, generation — ranked by cost and payback period, with the expected new label.

steps.title: Guidance & subsidy
steps.desc: We support implementation and subsidy applications (such as ISDE) so you benefit fully from available schemes.

About.title: About us
About.subtitle: Sana Archicons
About.lead: Sana Archicons is a Dutch advisory firm specialising in construction advisory, energy consulting and AI consultancy. We combine technical expertise with innovative technology for sustainable and future-oriented solutions.
About.mission: To help companies and property owners make smarter, more sustainable and more efficient decisions — by combining the power of AI with practical construction and energy knowledge.
About.vision: To become the natural partner for organisations that want intelligent, data-driven and sustainable solutions — accessible and personal.
About.founderBio: With more than 10 years of experience in construction and the energy sector, combined with in-depth knowledge of artificial intelligence, Hamid helps organisations take the step towards a smarter future.
About.exp1Desc: Technical surveys, architectural drawings, permit processes and supervision of refurbishments and renovations.
About.exp2Desc: Energy scans, EPA tailored advice, heat pumps, solar panels and subsidy applications (ISDE, SEEH).
About.exp3Desc: AI strategy, process automation, data utilisation and implementation of AI tools in existing business processes.
About.bodyPlaceholder: My full story and CV are coming soon. Hamid will share his photo and resume so this section can be filled in personally.
